sections.name: Oratio
lines: Grant, we beseech You, almighty God, that the great festival of Your blessed Martyrs, Hippolytus and Cassian, may further both our holiness and our salvation.

sections.name: Secreta
lines: Look with favor, O Lord, upon the offerings of Your people on the devout festival of these Saints, and may their witness to Your truth profit for our salvation.

sections.name: Postcommunio
lines: May the eating of Your sacrament save us, O Lord, and make us stand firm in the light of Your truth.
